caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a logo, and over-ear headphones speaks into a professional microphone. He is seated in a studio setting with a white wall behind him featuring a repeated logo that reads "GRIND HUSTLE" alongside five stars. Large text in the background reads "BOSS TALK 101." On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" in the lower-left corner and "BOSS TALK 101" in the lower-right. Across the frames, the man's expression and posture shift as he talks; he begins by looking slightly to his right, then gestures with his hands while speaking, and eventually looks forward with a more serious expression. His black t-shirt features a white graphic that reads "CHECK IT," which evolves into "CHECK IT MAN" as he moves.
